wikitext:
{{Relic Infobox|Unsettling Lamp|2}}
{{R|Unsettling Lamp||2}} is a {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Rare|Rare|2}} {{2|Relics|Relic}}.

== Sources ==
* Can be dropped by fighting {{2|Elites}}, by buying from the {{2|Merchant}} or from {{2|Mechanics#Chests|Chests}}. See Chest and non-Chest chance at {{2|Relics}}.

* Can be obtained from the relics {{R|Calling Bell||2}}, {{R|Shovel||2}} and {{R|Black Star||2}}.
<!--
* Can be obtained from the following events:

TODO: FIND RELIC SOURCES FROM EVENTS

-->
== Unlocking Unsettling Lamp==
{{R|Unsettling Lamp||2}} is unlocked along with {{R|Reptile Trinket||2}} and {{R|Intimidating Helmet||2}} in the {{2|Timeline#Scribbles|Scribbles}} Epoch.

== Interactions ==
* {{R|Unsettling Lamp|Unsettling Lamp's|2}} effect will be used up even if {{BD|Artifact||2}} prevents the debuff(s) from being applied.
* If a card applies multiple debuffs at once (such as {{C|Uppercut||2}}), ALL the debuffs will be doubled.
* If a card applies a debuff(s) to multiple enemies (such as {{C|Thunderclap||2}}), all the enemies will have double the debuff(s) applied.
* If a card applies multiple instances of a debuff(s) to an enemy in one play (such as {{C|Bouncing Flask||2}}), all instances of the debuff(s) will be doubled.
* {{R|Unsettling Lamp||2}} does ''not'' affect:
** Debuffs applied to the player, such as with {{C|Doubt||2}} or {{C|Neurosurge||2}}.
** Debuffs applied by other {{2|Relics}} or {{2|Potions}}.
** Debuffs applied by buffs on the player (such as {{BD|Noxious Fumes||2}} or {{BD|Reaper Form||2}}).
* Note that many cards apply special debuffs for their effects, even when their text does not explicitly state "Apply X [debuff]." These cards will be affected by {{R|Unsettling Lamp||2}}.

=== Synergies ===
* {{C|Assassinate||2}} and {{C|Suppress||2}} are {{KW|Innate||2}}, guaranteeing they can double their debuffs at the start of each battle.
* {{R|Royal Stamp||2}} {{KW|Royally Approved|Royally Approves|2}} a card to make it {{KW|Innate||2}}.
* {{R|Electric Shrymp||2}} {{KW|Imbued|Imbues|2}} a Skill to play it immediately for free at the start of each battle. 

=== Neutral ===
* {{C|Molten Fist||2}} works by applying {{KW|Vulnerable||2}} equal to the enemy's existing {{KW|Vulnerable||2}}. With {{R|Unsettling Lamp||2}}, it will effectively triple the enemy's {{KW|Vulnerable||2}} (not quadruple it, as might be expected). However, this requires the enemy to have {{KW|Vulnerable||2}} from a non-card source (e.g. a {{P|Vulnerable Potion||2}}) or another player.

== Update History ==
* '''Early Access v0.98'''
** Added Unsettling Lamp to the game.
